name: eve-workspace
description: Eve Workspace - Multi-provider LLM web interface

scripts.ssl:dual: HTTPS_CERT=./certs/server.pem HTTPS_KEY=./certs/server-key.pem PORT=443 DUAL_LISTEN=true HTTP_PORT=3000 node server.js
scripts.register: /Applications/Relay.app/Contents/MacOS/relay service register --name Eve --command node --args server.js --workdir . --url http://localhost:3000 --autostart
